title: The Backrooms unusual sightings
description: This mod ads a few backrooms levels that are less known than others
body:
# Welcome to a new Backrooms experience!

### Information
I tried to make these levels as lore accurate as possible

## Current Levels

### Level: "The Barrier"
This level was discontinued by the backrooms wiki fandom so the only information to this level can be found on YouTube

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Backrooms Entry Point](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a210f137f4056e7b5883734e3afda186972c9e9.jpeg)
The backrooms can be entered threw this glint which can spawn anywhere above sea level

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92ad21cdc7a914cf94a9e3403ad776a375ddaf4f.jpeg)
In such houses you can find almond water and other food items

![Tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be75d9e246f9ae2a779b858244c54f03dd92b512.jpeg)
This is the entry to the next Backrooms level

</details>

### Level: 4000
This level was also discontinued by the backrooms wiki fandom so the only information to this level can be found on YouTube (ignore where all of this is going)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Lvl 4000](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66e249f807047fcaefa47fc7651959aaddc40714.jpeg)
This is Backrooms Level 4000 its just a infinite ocean (what else did you expect?)

![deathwhale](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb891db0a61edb296ebdcdf1ffb3c910fae13bac.jpeg)
The deathwhale is the main entity in this dimension and should be avoided at all cost

The level can be exited by jumping into a black hole inside a rock formation that looks like a circle.




</details>
### Infirmation
The shader used for the screenshots is BSL
